componentDescription: Enables sharing content via the Web Share API with a customizable button.

shareData.description: Specifies the data (e.g., URL, text, title) to be shared using the Web Share API.

label.description: Defines the content displayed within the share button, which can be any React node.

onShareStart.description: A callback function executed just before the sharing process is initiated.

onShareSuccess.description: A callback function executed when the sharing operation successfully completes.

onShareCancel.description: A callback function executed if the user cancels the sharing dialog.

onShareError.description: A callback function executed if an error occurs during the sharing process, providing the error object.

onUnsupported.description: A callback function executed if the Web Share API is not supported by the user's browser.

disableWhenUnsupported.description: A boolean property that determines whether the share button should be disabled if the Web Share API is unsupported.

onClick.description: An optional click handler for the button, overriding the default `onClick` from `ButtonProps`.

children.description: React children to be rendered inside the button, providing a flexible way to add content and overriding the 'label' prop.

icon.description: A custom icon component to render within the button. If not provided, a default ShareIcon will be used.

size.description: Specifies the predefined size of the button and its default icon.

isDisabled.description: A boolean prop that explicitly disables the button, preventing user interaction.

isLoading.description: A boolean prop that, when true, displays a loading spinner within the button.

iconPosition.description: Determines the placement of the icon relative to the button's text.
